suites.title: [STATE-COVERAGE] v137 DATA-LOSS guard (founder P0: lists + prefs wiped)

specs.title: THE BUG: cloudSync must NOT write before the cloud profile is read
after the restore completes, cloudSync writes normally
a brand-new account (no cloud profile) can still sync
placeholder prefs are never persisted over real ones
an auth change re-arms the gate (account switch cannot clobber)
THE BUG: cloudSync must NOT write before the cloud profile is read

an auth change re-arms the gate (account switch cannot clobber)
